name: futbolista-wc2026-data
description: Live World Cup 2026 data feed for The Futbolista Closet hub page. Pulls the schedule/groups/results from openfootball + live scores from API-Football, converts to Israel time + Hebrew, and publishes one wc2026-data.json the storefront fetches directly. Standalone, OUTSIDE the theme repo — the live theme is never pushed on a data refresh.
